title: Duplicate detection at scale
description: Write has_duplicates(items) that returns True if the list contains any repeated (hashable) element. It must stay fast on large inputs (tens of thousands of elements).
constraints: Must run in roughly O(n) — it will be called on lists of 50k+ items.
Return False for [] and single-element lists.

perf_test.code:
assert has_duplicates(list(range(60000))) is False
assert has_duplicates(list(range(60000)) + [0]) is True
